channel.title: Beijing on Qingchen Yu
channel.description: Recent content in Beijing on Qingchen Yu

item.title: Spring Blossoms on Beihang Campus
item.description: Vibrant Pink Crabapple Blossoms | 校园里盛开的粉色海棠 Elegant White Crabapple Blossoms | 洁白淡雅的白海棠

item.title: A Moment at the Summer Palace
item.description: A Corner of the Summer Palace | 颐和园一角 A peaceful moment by the lake | 颐和园湖畔的宁静时刻

item.title: A Sunny Day at Tiananmen Square
item.description: Tiananmen Gate under a clear sky | 晴空下的天安门城楼

item.title: A Night Visit to the Temple of Heaven
item.description: The Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests | 夜暮中的祈年殿

item.title: A Visit to Gongdelin Relics
item.description: Gongdelin Relics Plaque | 功德林遗存铭牌 Gongdelin Relics Building | 功德林遗址旧楼

item.title: Attending the 2nd Open Source Tech Conference
item.description: On November 22, 2025, I attended the 2nd Open Source Technology Academic Conference held at the Beijing E-Town International Convention & Exhibition Center. It was a privilege to witness the official inauguration of the CAST Open Source Innovation Committee. The event brought together experts and developers to discuss the future of the open-source ecosystem, and I gained valuable insights into the latest community developments and industrial applications. The Unveiling Ceremony of the CAST Open Source Innovation Committee Exploring the Open Source Community Exhibition and Booths
